title: Lazy-Sunday British Dates Pilaf
description: A low-carb lazy Sunday dish featuring chewy dates and a blend of spices to enhance the natural sweetness.
instructions: Soak the dates in hot water for at least an hour to rehydrate.
In a small saucepan, heat Madras paste with salt until fragrant and slightly thickened.
Add saffron threads and allow them to infuse into the paste mixture for about 2-3 minutes.
Drain the dates and chop them into bite-sized pieces. Add them to the pan along with the soaked water.
Stir in unsweetened shredded coconut and optional chopped nuts if using.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish. Pour the Madras paste mixture over the top evenly.
Bake at 350°F (175°C) for about 20 minutes or until lightly golden on top.
